home.upcomingEvent: Upcoming: The Art of Hearing Pastors Conference
home.bsDescription: Train for ministry at one of the world's most anointed Bible schools. Anagkazo equips believers with deep biblical knowledge and practical ministry skills — producing ministers who transform nations.
home.scripture: Go ye therefore, and teach all nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father, and of the Son, and of the Holy Ghost.

about.heroSubtitle: The global outreach arm of the Dag Heward-Mills Ministry — building on a legacy of pastoral equipping that began in 1988
about.missionText: 190 Nations Office is the global outreach arm of the Dag Heward-Mills Ministry, dedicated to empowering pastors and church leaders worldwide to fulfil the Great Commission. Through weekly conferences, free books, and practical training, we equip leaders with the tools they need to build thriving churches.
about.bishopBio: Bishop Dag Heward-Mills is the founder of the United Denomination Originating from the Lighthouse Group of Churches. With over 37 years of ministry experience, he has authored more than 100 books that have been translated into over 50 languages, reaching millions of pastors and believers worldwide.
about.loyaltyDesc: We are committed to faithfully executing the mandate to equip every pastor and leader.
about.resourcesDesc: All books and conference materials are provided free of charge to pastors worldwide.
about.unityDesc: We believe in connecting pastors across borders for mutual encouragement and support.
about.equippingDesc: Our teachings focus on actionable principles that transform churches and communities.
about.timelineSubtitle: Key milestones in our mission to equip pastors worldwide

conferences.step1Desc: Sign up with your name, church, and country to join our network.
conferences.step2Desc: Connect every Saturday at 10:00 AM GMT for live teaching and fellowship.
conferences.step3Desc: Receive free books, teaching materials, and ongoing pastoral support.
conferences.topicsSubtitle: Comprehensive training covering every aspect of pastoral ministry
conferences.countrySubtitle: In-person pastoral conferences held across the globe
conferences.upcomingSubtitle: Join us in person at one of these upcoming gatherings
conferences.pastArchiveSubtitle: A look back at recent in-person gatherings
conferences.noUpcoming: We're planning the next round of conferences. Subscribe for updates or contact us to host one in your country.
conferences.ctaSubtitle: Join pastors from around the world for our weekly conference
conferences.liveEveryText: Join us every Saturday at 10:00 AM GMT

books.heroSubtitle: Equipping pastors with practical, life-changing resources
books.librarySubtitle: Browse our complete collection of free ministry resources
books.languagesSubtitle: Our books reach pastors in their heart language
books.ctaSubtitle: Request any book from our library — completely free for pastors and church leaders

bibleSchool.heroSubtitle: Comprehensive ministry training for church leaders
bibleSchool.classroomDesc: Intensive in-person training sessions covering theology, leadership, and practical ministry skills.
bibleSchool.leadershipDesc: Focused workshops designed to develop and sharpen leadership abilities for pastoral ministry.
bibleSchool.prayerDesc: Powerful times of prayer and spiritual impartation to ignite passion for ministry.
bibleSchool.curriculumSubtitle: Comprehensive training covering every aspect of ministry
bibleSchool.applySubtitle: Contact us to learn more about upcoming training sessions in your region
bibleSchool.whoCanApplyDesc: Pastors, church leaders, and ministers in training. No previous formal theological qualification is required.
bibleSchool.durationDesc: Each cohort runs for 12 weeks, with one live online session per week plus self-paced material.
bibleSchool.costDesc: Free of charge for all qualifying pastors. Optional donations support new students from under-resourced regions.
bibleSchool.whatYouGetDesc: Certificate of completion, full access to the resource library, mentorship pairing, and entry into our 190 Nations alumni network.
bibleSchool.nextCohortDesc: Applications open year-round. Get in touch to learn the start date for your region's next intake.

contact.heroSubtitle: We'd love to hear from you
contact.privacyNotice: By submitting this form, you agree that we may contact you about your enquiry. We will never share your details with third parties. See how we handle your data in our
contact.responseTimeNote: We typically respond within 1–2 business days.

give.heroSubtitle: Your generosity helps equip pastors across 190 nations
give.oneTimeDesc: Make a single donation to support our global pastoral ministry.
give.monthlyDesc: Become a monthly partner and provide sustained support for pastoral equipping.
give.sponsorDesc: Sponsor the printing and distribution of ministry books to pastors worldwide.
give.contactDesc: Reach out to our team to arrange your contribution
give.frequencyTitle: Choose How You'd Like to Give
give.frequencySubtitle: Pick a giving type, then select the payment method that works best for you.
give.methodSubtitle: All payments are processed securely by trusted providers.
give.methodStripeDesc: Credit or debit card. Supports most countries.
give.methodPayPalDesc: Pay from your PayPal balance or linked card.
give.methodBankAppDesc: Direct UK bank transfer. View account details and pay from your banking app.
give.bankAppNote: Open your banking app and use these details to make the transfer.
give.bankTransferDesc: For larger gifts or wire transfers, please contact us and our team will share account details for your region.
give.taxNoticeDesc: 190 Nations Office is part of the Dag Heward-Mills Ministry. Receipt availability depends on your country of residence — please contact us if you need official documentation for your gift.
